title: Hello, rEx
story: [Meridian-7 Log #001] Sensors detected a faint repeating signal amid white noise. Among the flood of interference data, the same word keeps appearing — "hello". Is this some kind of greeting? You need to pinpoint this word in the noise.
promptChallenge: [Target] Lines carrying the keyword "hello" from the noise stream.
hints: [Hint] The keyword in the signal is lowercase
[Hint] You need to match the exact word "hello"
[Hint] Note: HELLO and hello are different signal frequencies
promptHints: Tell the AI directly what content you want to match
Hint the AI to be case-sensitive
Tell the AI to only match lowercase hello

feedback.onPass: [Signal Locked] "hello" — the first word from the void. Someone is out there.
feedback.onFail: [Parse Failed] Signal not captured. Check if your instructions precisely describe the target.
feedback.onPerfect: [Signal Locked — Zero Noise] First-try hit. The first handshake across the stars.
feedback.onDirectWrite: [Manual Override] You don't need the assist system. You are the rules.
